raw_input: I just had a chat with Darren Tan from Accenture. He is an alumnus of the MITB programme. Accenture is now hiring more juniors and increasing the pay from 5500 to 6000 SGD per month. They are looking for students that have expertise in LangGraph and Python to aid with their rollout of their new Generative AI business unit.

intent_cards.summary: Update Accenture employer record with new junior hiring push, increased salary to 6000 SGD/month, and GenAI skill requirements (LangGraph, Python)

diff.headcount_estimate: Increasing junior hires as part of new Generative AI business unit rollout
diff.notes: Accenture is ramping up junior hiring for their new Generative AI business unit. Looking for candidates with expertise in LangGraph and Python. Monthly salary increased from 5500 to 6000 SGD.
